service.name: Google Cloud Natural Language API
service.description_for_ai: NLP analysis by Google. Sentiment analysis, entity extraction, syntax analysis, content classification, entity sentiment. 5000 units/month free. Use for text classification, sentiment analysis of customer feedback, entity recognition.

auth.how_to_get: Enable Natural Language API at https://console.cloud.google.com
auth.cost: Free: 5000 units/month. Then $1/1000 for sentiment, $2/1000 for entities

capabilities.description_for_ai: Analyze sentiment of text: overall positive/negative/neutral score and per-sentence breakdown.

document.description: {type: PLAIN_TEXT or HTML, content: text_to_analyze, language: en|ru|de|fr}

capabilities.description_for_ai: Extract named entities from text: people, organizations, locations, dates, numbers. Returns Wikipedia knowledge graph links.
Classify text into 700+ content categories. Useful for content moderation, topic detection, ad targeting.
